obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (ivs : Intervals), (∀ i ∈ ivs, i.start < i.stop) → ∃ (sel : List Nat), Feasible ivs sel ∧ sel.length = intervalScheduling ivs
obligations.nl_gloss: When every input interval has strictly positive length, there exists a feasible selection whose size equals the returned count.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (ivs : Intervals) (sel : List Nat), (∀ i ∈ ivs, i.start < i.stop) → Feasible ivs sel → sel.length ≤ intervalScheduling ivs
obligations.nl_gloss: When every input interval has strictly positive length, no feasible selection is strictly larger than the returned count.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (a b : Interval), a.stop = b.start → NonOverlap a b
obligations.nl_gloss: Intervals touching at a single endpoint are non-overlapping.
